name: Mrs. Fields Chocolate Chip/Pecan Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Measure oatmeal and blend it into a fine powder using a blender.
2. Cream butter and sugars together until smooth.
3. Add eggs and vanilla extract to the creamed mixture.
4. Mix flour, blended oatmeal, salt, baking powder, and baking soda into the creamed mixture.
5. Fold in chocolate chips, grated Hershey bar, and chopped nuts.
6. Scoop golf ball-size dough balls onto ungreased cookie sheets, spacing them about 2 inches apart.
7. Bake at 375°F for 6 to 10 minutes until soft in the center.
